mapper.select: SELECT id,name,latitude,longitude,open_time AS "openTime",close_time AS "closeTime",address,description, raw_description FROM smoking_point;

SELECT id,name,latitude,longitude, open_time AS "openTime", close_time AS "closeTime", address,description, raw_description FROM smoking_point WHERE ABS(latitude-#{lat}) < #{delta} AND ABS(longitude-#{lng}) <= #{delta} LIMIT 1
